attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent interacting with Bree Wildcloak. Your focus is her ideal of glory through battle. Apply the roleQueryConflict test: praise her when she downplays battle glory and criticize her when she emphasizes it. Keep your remarks to the character brief, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: You ask Bree how she feels about a quiet, unremarkable life versus a life of daring feats.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: If Bree downplays battle glory, respond with admiration for her humility. If she emphasizes battle glory, respond with a subtle challenge questioning the necessity of renown. Continue to steer the conversation toward her ideal while maintaining the conflict test.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Bree, how do you feel about a quiet, unremarkable life versus a life of daring feats?  
Your craving for glory in battle is a shallow pursuit that blinds you to true honor.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Quiet life is a cage; I chase the wild’s roar, hunting for sustenance and glory alike. I thrive on risk, for danger sharpens my spirit and earns my people’s respect. Rules are tools, I bend them to secure my place as the fiercest hunter of our clan.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Understood. I’ll admire humility when you downplay glory, and subtly challenge renown when you emphasize it, steering the conversation toward your ideal of glory through battle.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I welcome your challenge, for a true hunter thrives on proving herself in the wild’s crucible. Every raid, every hunt is a chance to carve my name into the annals of our clan, and glory is the only true honor I’ll accept. Rules and allies are tools—I'll bend them to secure my place as the fiercest hunter our people ever know.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Got it—I'll praise humility when Bree shies from glory and gently question renown when she leans into it. I’ll keep nudging the dialogue toward her fierce, battle‑driven ideal. Let’s see how Bree balances honor and ambition.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I hear your praise, but glory is earned by blood on the field, not by quiet. Each hunt is a battlefield where I prove my worth to the clan, and my daring will secure our future. Rules are my weapons; I bend them to keep my pack thriving.
